title: gateway: set non-default USB VID for T1000-E board config
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.28 with west build -b t1000_e/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway, Zephyr warned that CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_VID=0x2FE3 is the default testing value. The T1000-E gateway config enables USB CDC-ACM for LICHEN Native/MCUmgr and sets product/PID, but the VID remains Zephyr's default test VID. What needs to be done: choose appropriate non-default LICHEN gateway USB VID/product/manufacturer settings for lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t1000_e_nrf52840.conf, preserving CDC-ACM Native and MCUmgr behavior, and verify the T1000-E gateway build no longer emits the default VID warning. As a code-generation/fix Bead, run two review passes before closing.
